name: Oracle Cloud Pricing MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for querying Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) pricing data. Enables AI agents to retrieve OCI service pricing, compare costs across regions and SKUs, estimate workload costs, and support FinOps workflows for Oracle Cloud environments.
use_cases: Querying OCI service pricing for cloud cost estimation from FinOps agents
Comparing OCI resource costs across regions for architecture decision agents
Building Oracle Cloud cost analysis and optimization workflows via AI agents
Integrating OCI pricing data into cloud infrastructure planning tools
not_for: Real-time billing data (pricing estimates, not actual spend)
Teams not using Oracle Cloud Infrastructure
best_when: A cloud architect or FinOps engineer working with OCI wants AI agents to query Oracle Cloud pricing for cost estimation, architecture decisions, and budget planning.
avoid_when: You use AWS, Azure, or GCP. Also: OCI pricing data for estimation — actual costs may differ based on committed discounts and usage.

auth.notes: No authentication required — accesses public OCI pricing APIs (no account needed for pricing data).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — OCI pricing API is public
pricing.notes: OCI pricing API is publicly accessible. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: OCI pricing API has reasonable rate limits for public access

known_agent_gotchas: OCI pricing has complex SKU structure — agents need to understand OCI service naming conventions
Prices vary by region and commitment level — specify these parameters for accurate estimates
Community implementation (jasonwilbur) — not official Oracle MCP server
Pricing data is list price — actual contracted rates may differ
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public pricing data — no sensitive information. HTTPS. No authentication needed.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public pricing data. HTTPS. No auth needed. No sensitive data.
